description: CompositionWhite kurta made of 100% cotton, with a butterfly sleeve, round neck, red tape lining along the neck and sleeve hems, and has pink and blue thread detailing along the lengthFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this simple kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
